series_metadata.series_description: Records of federal and state funds allocated to counties. Document originates in this office. Letter is sent to county; copy is kept 2 years in office then destroyed. Form letter and worksheets (recap sheets), and individual county certifivation letter.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operatiog area for 2 years, in state records center for 3 years. State archives to review after federal and state audits are complete. Destroy if of no historical value to archives., Paper: Shred
